title: 2Pcs Christmas Highland Cow Figurines, Resin Xmas Cow Statues with Santa Hat & Gift Merry Sign, Festive Farmhouse Decor for Home, Garden, Christmas, Ideal Ornaments Set Brown
features: 🎄 CHRISTMAS-THEMED DESIGN & DETAILS: Features Santa hats, festive flower crowns, and holiday elements (gift box “Merry Christmas” sign), capturing the cozy charm of winter farm celebrations.
❄️ DURABLE resin FOR ALL SEASONS: Made from weather-resistant resin, preventing fading cracking—perfect for indoor/outdoor Christmas decor, lasting through holidays and beyond.
🏡 VERSATILE HOLIDAY DECOR: Ideal for mantels, dining tables, gardens, or as Christmas party accents—adds warmth to homes and festive cheer to outdoor spaces.
🎁 PERFECT CHRISTMAS GIFT SET: A unique present for farmhouse style lovers, holiday decorators, or anyone wanting to spread Christmas joy with whimsical cow figurines.

📦 Elevate Your Space with Exquisite Home Decoration: Transform your home into a haven of style and charm with a stunning collection of ornaments and accessories. Whether you're seeking ornaments for the home or elegant ornaments for living room spaces, there’s a perfect piece for every aesthetic.
description: Embrace the Christmas Charm with Highland Cow Ornaments Bring the warmth of a Scottish winter farm Christmas into your home with this exquisite set of resin Christmas Highland cow ornaments. Each piece showcases a festive pose and adorable expression, enhanced by intricate details such as fluffy fur textures and holiday-themed accents (Santa hats, gift box, small Christmas tree). The harmonious contrast between the brown bovine body and Christmas elements creates a striking festive visual appeal, making it an instant focal point in any holiday space. Built to Last Through Holiday Seasons Crafted from premium weather-resistant resin, these ornaments maintain their vibrant color and structural integrity whether placed indoors (on mantels, dining tables) or outdoors (in gardens, patios). From snowy Decembers to festive gatherings, they resist fading, cracking, and deformation—ensuring joyful Christmas decor year after year. Transform Your Space with Festive Elegance Place these charming cows on your mantel to welcome Christmas cheer, style up your dining table for holiday meals, or nestle them in garden greenery for a touch of festive whimsy. Their rustic farmhouse Christmas aesthetic seamlessly blends with various decor styles, making them perfect for home enthusiasts, holiday decorators, and gift-givers alike to spread Christmas joy. Thoughtful Packaging for Perfect Holiday Delivery We prioritize your satisfaction: each set is securely packaged with inner polygon cushioning and an outer carton box to guarantee safe transit. You’ll receive one Santa Hat & Gift Box Cow and one Tree - Decorated Highland Cow, ready to inspire holiday joy and elevate your Christmas decor. Order Now and Redefine Your Home’s Christmas Character! Specifications Colour Options: Brown (with Christmas accents) Material: Resin Packaging Weight: Approximately 650g Size: 11.5*8*9cm Package includes 1 x Santa Hat & Gift Box Highland Cow Ornament 1 x Christmas Tree - Decorated Highland Cow Ornament
